sources.qualified_teams_and_group_tables: NBC Sports / FIFA / La Republica (final group standings)

caveats: Data from an ongoing World Cup: 'live' values and standings change with each matchday.
Transfermarkt values in EUR; equivalent USD listings exist with different figures.
pedigree_score is a reproducible proxy (titles + best finish + appearances); it underestimates teams with multiple finals/semifinals but no title (NED, SWE, POR, CRO).

performance_model.opponent_adjustment: planned (Phase 2): the expected xGD given the opponent's pre-tournament FIFA points is the baseline, and the residual (actual - expected) is the strength-of-schedule-adjusted signal. opponent_fifa_points is captured per match now.
performance_model.note: Phase 1 stores xG-proxy intermediates and per-match opponent_fifa_points only; match probabilities are unchanged. The form correction activates per team once matches_covered >= coverage_threshold.

fifa_ranking.source_note: Official points as of 2026-06-11 (pre-World Cup base, FIFA Elo system). 'points_live' reflects the evolution during the tournament.
